About Efuab

Where Artistry
Meets Intention

Efuab was founded with one clear vision — to create a beauty experience that is as personal as it is exceptional. Based in the heart of Accra, we blend technical mastery with a deep understanding of beauty for the modern woman.

Every client who walks through our doors deserves to feel seen, elevated, and radiant. From a soft everyday look to a full bridal transformation, we bring the same dedication and craft to every appointment.

Our Services

Beauty, Crafted
With Precision

Every service is tailored with care, expertise, and the highest quality products — because you deserve nothing less.

Most Popular

Lashes

Volume, hybrid, and classic lash sets applied with expert precision. Wake up with a perfect flutter — no mascara needed.

Book Now

Makeup Artistry

From soft everyday glam to full editorial — expertly blended, long-lasting, and stunning on every skin tone.

Book Now

Brows

Perfectly shaped and defined brows tailored to your face — from clean threading and tinting to ombre and microblading.

Wellness

Facials

Targeted facial treatments designed for Ghana's climate — brightening, hydrating, and deeply restorative sessions for glowing skin.
